description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a prominent slanted shed roof and a mix of vertical wood and horizontal panel siding. The structure features a spacious wraparound balcony supported by slender columns, providing an elevated outdoor area. Large rectangular windows are arranged asymmetrically on both levels, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The house sits on a concrete foundation, and the balcony is accessed via a set of exterior stairs. The color palette consists of muted gray-green panels, natural wood tones, and black window frames, giving it a contemporary yet warm appearance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor space, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a slanted roof, wraparound balcony, and large asymmetrical windows, featuring wood and panel siding in muted tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing two stories, vertical panel siding, two large windows, and the overhanging slanted roof.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the wood siding, a single window, and the full width of the slanted roof.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the long balcony, exterior stairs, and multiple windows visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main balcony, large windowed entry, and the supporting columns beneath the balcony.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via balcony with large glass doors, supported by columns and accessed by exterior stairs, featuring a simple, open design.
